docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,225.27 FILED BY SHKOLNIK, INNA D.B.A. UNITRANS AS TO DEFENDANT ZHOU, JOHNNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-03-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZHOU, JOHNNY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-22-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CASE CALLED AT 10:37 AM. IGOR SHVARTSMAN APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. PER COURT, MATTER CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDEG: LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHKOLNIK, INNA D.B.A. UNITRANS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHOU, JOHNNY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153
